case_title: NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE VS. ELAINE SANDERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE $4,186.70 PRINCIPAL, $783.90 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,345.60, SEE SCANNED COURT JUDGMENT
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-22-2016 CONTINUED TO AUG-03-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $375.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16236010) AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16236010) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 17152010) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 16230058) AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 16230058) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-15-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE SEP-13-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-22-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-19-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-31-2016
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100019916), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE SERVED APR-14-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDERS, ELAINE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-03-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION REGARDING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 16236010) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT BY COURT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 16236010) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-15-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE MUTUAL INSURANCE
